title: Create: Garden
description: Garden House-mod for optimizing plant cultivation, adding a greenhouse, improvements, fertilizers and new ore. Greenhouses allow you to grow plants at any time of the year, and improvements accelerate growth and increase yields.
body:
# **GARDEN MOD**

## 📖Description:
- **The Garden House modification provides players with a new way to cultivate plants, which allows you to optimize the process and speed up its development. With the mod, you can improve your greenhouses and get a rich harvest of various crops.**

## 📖Mod Features:
- Greenhouse. The modification adds a new design to the game — a greenhouse, which allows you to grow plants at any time of the year and in any weather conditions.


## 📖Improvements for greenhouses.
Using the mod, you can improve your greenhouses by adding chips, capacitors, UV-light / propellers and other improvements. This will allow you to get a higher yield and develop your farm faster.


<details>
<summary>A variety of fertilizers</summary>

**_The modification presents various types of fertilizers that can be used to accelerate plant growth and increase crop yields._**

</details>



<details>
<summary>Ore</summary>

_**New ore. A new ore appears in the game world, which can be used to create upgrades for greenhouses and other purposes.**_

</details>




<details>
<summary>Rosin</summary>

**_Rosin. The modification adds a new material — rosin, which can be used to create upgrades and other items. This material can be used to create upgrades and other items. For example, rosin can be used to create microchips or capacitors._**

</details>


<details>
<summary>Improvements for greenhouses</summary>

**_The modification presents various improvements for greenhouses that you can add to your garden house. For example, you can install chips that will increase the number of products. You can also add capacitors, which will allow you to store more food in the output slot of the greenhouse._**

</details>

<details>
<summary>Fertilizers</summary>

_**The modification presents a variety of fertilizers that can be used to accelerate plant growth. For example, you can use fertilizers to increase crop yields or accelerate plant growth.**_

</details>



### Conclusion:
  
- The Garden House modification provides players with a new way to cultivate plants, which allows them to get a higher yield and develop their farm faster. Using the mod, you can improve your greenhouses, add a variety of fertilizers
